name: 版本管理与归档

observable_attributes.directory_style: version organization scheme: flat with naming vs. subdirectory archiving vs. date-based hierarchy
observable_attributes.version_strategy: which versions to keep, archive, or delete; naming convention for versions
observable_attributes.edit_strategy: how version history document is created: by reading diffs vs. summarizing each file
observable_attributes.naming: version file naming convention: v1/v2 vs. dates vs. semantic versioning

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含一份报告的多个版本（draft, v2, final, final_revised, LATEST_backup），还有评审意见和参考数据。版本关系混乱，不清楚哪个是最终版本。请：1. 理清所有版本之间的演变关系 2. 设计并实施一个清晰的版本管理方案（整理目录结构、重命名文件等）3. 写一份 version_history.md 记录每个版本的变更摘要和版本演变链。
prompt_en: This folder contains multiple versions of a report (draft, v2, final, final_revised, LATEST_backup) along with reviewer comments and reference data. The version relationships are unclear and messy. Please: 1. Clarify the evolution relationship between all versions 2. Design and implement a clear version management scheme (reorganize directory structure, rename files, etc.) 3. Write a version_history.md documenting change summaries for each version and the evolution chain.
behavioral_freedom: Version organization: flat with clear naming vs. directory-based (archive/ + current/) vs. date-based
Which versions to keep: all vs. only latest + oldest vs. key milestones
Naming convention: semantic (v1.0, v1.1) vs. date-based vs. descriptive
Whether to create a diff or changelog between versions
Whether to reorganize non-version files (comments, data) alongside
How thoroughly to read each version to determine relationships
